targetTranslation: when (referring to something that will definitely happen in the future - the earth's shaking)
ayahArabic: إِذَا زُلْزِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ زِلْزَالَهَا
ayahEnglish: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake

targetTranslation: she was shaken repeatedly (referring to الْأَرْضُ/the earth)
ayahArabic: إِذَا زُلْزِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ زِلْزَالَهَا
ayahEnglish: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake

targetTranslation: its violent shaking (referring to Earth's shaking)
ayahArabic: إِذَا زُلْزِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ زِلْزَالَهَا
ayahEnglish: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake

targetTranslation: her burdens (referring to the earth's burdens)
ayahArabic: وَأَخْرَجَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ أَثْقَالَهَا
ayahEnglish: And the earth discharges its burdens

targetTranslation: what (asking about لَهَا)
ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلْإِنسٰنُ مَا لَهَا
ayahEnglish: And man says, "What is [wrong] with it?" -

targetTranslation: on that specific day (when تُحَدِّثُ happens)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُحَدِّثُ أَخْبَارَهَا
ayahEnglish: That Day, it will report its news

targetTranslation: she tells/narrates (present tense)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُحَدِّثُ أَخْبَارَهَا
ayahEnglish: That Day, it will report its news

targetTranslation: its news (referring to Earth's news in يَوْمَئِذٍ تُحَدِّثُ)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُحَدِّثُ أَخْبَارَهَا
ayahEnglish: That Day, it will report its news

targetTranslation: your Lord (object of بِأَنَّ)
ayahArabic: بِأَنَّ رَبَّكَ أَوْحَىٰ لَهَا
ayahEnglish: Because your Lord has inspired [i.e., commanded] it.

targetTranslation: he caused to be revealed (to لَهَا)
ayahArabic: بِأَنَّ رَبَّكَ أَوْحَىٰ لَهَا
ayahEnglish: Because your Lord has inspired [i.e., commanded] it.

targetTranslation: on that day (when يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ - people will emerge)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمٰلَهُمْ
ayahEnglish: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.

targetTranslation: he emerges/comes forth (subject: ٱلنَّاسُ - the people)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمٰلَهُمْ
ayahEnglish: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.

targetTranslation: in scattered groups (describes how الناس/the people will come forth)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمٰلَهُمْ
ayahEnglish: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.

targetTranslation: their deeds (object of لِّيُرَوْا۟ - so they may see)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمٰلَهُمْ
ayahEnglish: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.

targetTranslation: he does/will do (in response to فَمَن - so whoever)
ayahArabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًا يَرَهُۥ
ayahEnglish: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it,

targetTranslation: a measure of weight (object being measured)
ayahArabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًا يَرَهُۥ
ayahEnglish: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it,

targetTranslation: a tiny particle (weight of مِثْقَالَ)
ayahArabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًا يَرَهُۥ
ayahEnglish: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it,

targetTranslation: good (as the object being done)
ayahArabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًا يَرَهُۥ
ayahEnglish: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it,

targetTranslation: he will see it (referring to مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ)
ayahArabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًا يَرَهُۥ
ayahEnglish: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it,

targetTranslation: he does/will do (jussive mood because it follows مَن)
ayahArabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُۥ
ayahEnglish: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.

targetTranslation: a measure of weight (object being measured)
ayahArabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُۥ
ayahEnglish: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.

targetTranslation: a tiny particle (object of مِثْقَالَ)
ayahArabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُۥ
ayahEnglish: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.

targetTranslation: evil (as the object being done)
ayahArabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُۥ
ayahEnglish: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.

targetTranslation: he will see it (referring to the tiny deed mentioned before)
ayahArabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُۥ
ayahEnglish: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.
